abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Made to Kill
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model is placed, it may declare a /// action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Phantasmal Blade
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Entranced token, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Staged
triggers.text: This model gains a Backtrack token.

triggers.name: Shadowjump
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with another model within 6".

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Malevolent Shadow
actions.effects: Make a Decoy marker within range. If this model does not have LoS to an enemy leader, enemy models within (aura)2" of the made marker must each pass a TN 13 Df duel or gain an Entranced token.

triggers.name: In the Wings
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with the made marker.

triggers.name: Thief's Pocket
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Unnatural Speed
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.
